signals.text: Zero FERMÀT sessions/revenue — platform completely inactive, no funnel metrics found
No Slack activity in 51+ days — brand not engaging in channel since Feb 14
No upcoming calls scheduled — need to book a sync
Pulkit emailed Brenda Apr 3 about Supreme Crème launch strategy
Brenda responded Apr 2 with interest in Supreme Crème landing page
Brand undergoing rebrand — may delay FERMÀT implementation further

recent.title: Westmore Beauty <> FERMÀT | Launch Kick Off
recent.participants: Brenda Hernandez, Jessica Tennant, Ryan Ruger (Westmore), Talia Cohen, Pulkit Srivastava (FERMÀT)
recent.summary: Kick-off call discussing 60 Second Eye Cream, Body Coverage Perfector, and Supreme Cream funnels. Integrations complete (Google Ads, GA, Klaviyo). Shifted to performance-focused approach targeting key products.

recent.title: Westmore Beauty <> FERMÀT | Launch Kick Off
recent.participants: Brenda Hernandez, Jessica Tennant, Ryan Ruger (Westmore), Pulkit Srivastava, Talia Cohen (FERMÀT)
recent.summary: Initial kick-off with Westmore Beauty team. Discussed Shopify integration, product selection, and funnel strategy.

calls.analysis: Two kick-off calls completed in early February. Last recorded call was Mar 11 (Granola) to address funnel pricing issues and go-live timeline. Brand has been slow to engage since, primarily due to an ongoing rebrand.

messages.text: Cross posting call update here with recap of conversation including funnel revisions, integration status, and action items.
Westmorebeauty has removed themselves from this channel.
Confirming I've reshared access to them!
Can you please add us as members from the admin? We don't use Slack internally.
Pre-call setup instructions with integration guides and onboarding checklist.

slack.analysis: Slack channel is essentially inactive. Westmore Beauty team doesn't use Slack internally and had access issues (removed themselves twice). Last substantive message from Talia on Feb 14. All communication has shifted to email between Pulkit and Jessica/Brenda.

messages.subject: Re: FERMÀT <> Westmore Beauty | Call Recap 2/13
messages.snippet: Hi Brenda, Thanks so much for reaching out! I'm excited to help you strategize and optimize the landing page for the Supreme Crème launch.

messages.subject: Re: FERMÀT <> Westmore Beauty | Call Recap 2/13
messages.snippet: Hi Pulkit, We are in the process of launching our refreshed Supreme Crème and would love to touch base with you.

messages.subject: Re: FERMÀT <> Westmore Beauty | Call Recap 2/13
messages.snippet: Hey Jessica, I know you're busy with the rebrand, but just wanted to check in.

messages.subject: Re: FERMÀT <> Westmore Beauty | Call Recap 2/13
messages.snippet: Hey Jessica, Thanks for the update! I completely understand how rebranding can take precedence.

messages.subject: Re: FERMÀT <> Westmore Beauty | Call Recap 2/13
messages.snippet: No I haven't we have been knee deep in the rebrand which we will also need to update all creative to match.

email.analysis: Email is the primary communication channel for Westmore. Pulkit has been persistent with follow-ups (Mar 18, Mar 31, Apr 3). The brand was unresponsive during their rebrand but re-engaged on Apr 2 when Brenda reached out about the Supreme Crème launch — a promising sign.
